interaction_phrase: My Department will continue to work with the quantum community in Ireland
occurrence_sentence: My Department will continue to work with the quantum community in Ireland and internationally to implement this strategy.

interaction_phrase: to become a global leader in the research, development and innovation that underpins the quantum revolution and become a hub for realising and exploiting the new opportunities in quantum technologies
occurrence_sentence: Together we can build on our existing successes in information and communication technologies to become a global leader in the research, development and innovation that underpins the quantum revolution and become a hub for realising and exploiting the new opportunities in quantum technologies.

interaction_phrase: a strong national strategy and action plan similar to those that have been developed in the European Union
occurrence_sentence: The opportunities and challenges offered by quantum technologies require a strong national strategy and action plan similar to those that have been developed in the European Union (EU) and other countries.

interaction_phrase: Ireland's Equal1 driving innovation
occurrence_sentence: Quantum technologies are now major research topics for IBM, Google, Microsoft, Intel, Honeywell and other technology giants. Quantum technologies is also a rapidly evolving market with several SMEs such as Pasqal, IQM, IonQ, AQT, PsiQuantum, Xanadu Quantum Technologies, and Ireland's Equal1 driving innovation in this space.

interaction_phrase: a strong presence in Ireland
occurrence_sentence: The development and utilisation of quantum technologies has already attracted considerable investment from international governments and industry leaders in the technology sector, including those with a strong presence in Ireland.

interaction_phrase: a strong presence in Ireland
occurrence_sentence: The development and utilisation of quantum technologies has already attracted considerable investment from international governments and industry leaders in the technology sector, including those with a strong presence in Ireland.

interaction_phrase: expertise provided by ... the Tyndall National Institute
occurrence_sentence: Ireland has unique strengths in the core technologies that underpin quantum communications and the quantum internet, such as communication networks and photonics, with expertise provided by CONNECT (SFI Research Centre for Future Networks & Communications), IPIC (SFI Research Centre for Photonics) and the Tyndall National Institute.

interaction_phrase: The National Quantum Technologies Strategy for Ireland
occurrence_sentence: The National Quantum Technologies Strategy for Ireland also focuses on training a new generation of engineers and scientists equipped with the tools they will need for the economy of the future.

interaction_phrase: funding of quantum technologies should be strategically aligned with areas of high strength
occurrence_sentence: To compete internationally, funding of quantum technologies should be strategically aligned with areas of high strength (quantum computing, quantum internet and enabling technologies) and priority for Ireland.

interaction_phrase: work with the European Commission
occurrence_sentence: In 2019, Ireland was one of twenty-seven member-states who signed the EuroQCI declaration agreeing to work with the European Commission and the European Space Agency in the development of the communication infrastructure that will cover the entire space of the EU.

interaction_phrase: work with the European Space Agency
occurrence_sentence: In 2019, Ireland was one of twenty-seven member-states who signed the EuroQCI declaration agreeing to work with the European Commission and the European Space Agency in the development of the communication infrastructure that will cover the entire space of the EU.

interaction_phrase: in partnership with
occurrence_sentence: In partnership with Microsoft Ireland, two scholarships have been offered for 2022/23 for outstanding female students wishing to undertake the master's.

interaction_phrase: collaborating with
occurrence_sentence: Trinity College Dublin are also collaborating with IBM on quantum research and pre-doctoral training programmes.

interaction_phrase: SFI US-Ireland Research and Development Partnership Scheme
occurrence_sentence: In July 2022, an investment of €3 million was announced in Convergent Quantum Research Alliance in Telecommunications (CoQREATE) through the SFI US-Ireland Research and Development Partnership Scheme.

interaction_phrase: a quantum ecosystem in Ireland
occurrence_sentence: In 2020, Quantum Computing in Ireland (QCoIr) aimed to unite quantum computer researchers and lay the foundations for a quantum ecosystem in Ireland.

interaction_phrase: partners from academia (Tyndall National Institute
occurrence_sentence: The project brings together partners from academia (Tyndall National Institute, Maynooth University, University College Dublin [UCD]) and enterprise, with participants from the multinational (IBM, Mastercard) and SME sectors (Equal1, Rockley Photonics) to collaborate on quantum computing with a particular focus on leveraging the on-chip photonic qubit platform developed in Tyndall National Institute.

interaction_phrase: approved by the European Commission
occurrence_sentence: The Irish response to the EuroQCI call for proposals, 'Deploying advanced national QCI systems and networks' was approved by the European Commission in July 2022.

interaction_phrase: spun out from UCD
occurrence_sentence: Equal1 is a quantum-computing SME that spun out from UCD.

interaction_phrase: funded by Atlantic Bridge
occurrence_sentence: Equal1 has been funded by Atlantic Bridge, Enterprise Ireland, Matterwave and European Innovation Council and is a leader in the most scalable approach to quantum computing.

interaction_phrase: co-founded by Prof. Robert Bogdan Staszewski
occurrence_sentence: The company was co-founded by Dr. Dirk Leipold, Prof. Robert Bogdan Staszewski (an SFI Research Professor of Electronic Circuits at UCD) and Mike Asker.

interaction_phrase: Associate Prof. in the School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering in UCD
occurrence_sentence: Current Chief Scientific Officer Elena Blokhina is an Associate Prof. in the School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering in UCD.

interaction_phrase: Creating Our Future
occurrence_sentence: Promote and expand activities that inform and engage the general public in quantum science and technologies. Building on the public-engagement exercise, Creating Our Future, novel approaches should be developed when engaging with the public.

interaction_phrase: stakeholders from the Department of Education
occurrence_sentence: This could be initiated through piloting a programme that brings together stakeholders from the Department of Education, teachers, students and quantum researchers to generate material on core concepts taught in secondary-level subjects such as physics, chemistry, mathematics and computer science through a quantum-technology lens.

interaction_phrase: part of the consortia of EU funding agencies
occurrence_sentence: SFI has been part of the consortia of EU funding agencies QuantERA and QuantERA II since 2015.

interaction_phrase: has participated in a variety of EU activities
occurrence_sentence: Ireland has participated in a variety of EU activities related to quantum technologies.

interaction_phrase: white paper on quantum technologies from the Tyndall National Institute
occurrence_sentence: The genesis of Ireland's national quantum technologies strategy dates to late 2019 with a white paper on quantum technologies from the Tyndall National Institute and a seminal meeting of quantum technologies stakeholders hosted by the IDA Ireland (IDA).

interaction_phrase: seminal meeting of quantum technologies stakeholders hosted by the IDA Ireland (IDA)
occurrence_sentence: The genesis of Ireland's national quantum technologies strategy dates to late 2019 with a white paper on quantum technologies from the Tyndall National Institute and a seminal meeting of quantum technologies stakeholders hosted by the IDA Ireland (IDA).

interaction_phrase: workshop hosted by Science Foundation Ireland (SFI)
occurrence_sentence: Shortly after, in January 2020, in a demonstration of Ireland's advantage as a small, highly connected country, many of the key players in the Irish quantum-technologies space came together at a workshop hosted by Science Foundation Ireland (SFI), which led to the establishment of the National Advisory Forum for Quantum Technologies (NAF-QT).

interaction_phrase: led to the establishment of the National Advisory Forum for Quantum Technologies (NAF-QT)
occurrence_sentence: Shortly after, in January 2020, in a demonstration of Ireland's advantage as a small, highly connected country, many of the key players in the Irish quantum-technologies space came together at a workshop hosted by Science Foundation Ireland (SFI), which led to the establishment of the National Advisory Forum for Quantum Technologies (NAF-QT).
target_actor: National Advisory Forum for Quantum Technologies

interaction_phrase: leveraged the work of the NAF-QT
occurrence_sentence: Recognising this need, colleagues in the Department of Further and Higher Education, Research Innovation and Science (DFHERIS), supported by Niall McEvoy, Ruth Kelly and Peter Clifford from SFI, leveraged the work of the NAF-QT and the invaluable input of the quantum-technology community to develop Ireland's first national quantum-technology strategy.
target_actor: National Advisory Forum for Quantum Technologies
